Connect2Work for Newcomers
Program Description

At YMCA BC, we believe every newcomer youth deserves a strong start to their career journey in Canada. Connect2Work program is dedicated to bridging the gap between settlement and employment, offering the essential skills, coaching and connections you need to confidently build your future in the local job market.

Drop-in
Free
Group of 15-20
Y Membership Required: No
Connect2Work for Newcomers
Program overview

Connect2Work is a free, pre-employment program that supports newcomer youth (ages 15 to 30) and adults (30+) in developing essential life and job readiness skills. Participants take part in workshops, receive one-on-one employment coaching, build communication and English language skills, digital skills and gain access to networking opportunities.

This program is available at the Robert Lee YCMA centre in downtown Vancouver.
Program benefits
Weekly skill-building workshops led by experienced facilitators
Individual coaching to navigate resumes, interviews and Canadian workplace culture
ESL support to strengthen communication and workplace readiness
Networking opportunities with peers and local professionals
Supportive environment that encourages settlement confidence and self-advocacy
Program eligibility
Ages 15+
Must be a newcomer
